title: RapidMeta Oncology | Inavolisib + Palbociclib + Fulvestrant in PIK3CA-Mutated HR+/HER2- Advanced BC v1.0
hero_h2: Inavolisib + Palbociclib + Fulvestrant in PIK3CA-Mutated HR+ HER2- Advanced BC

pico.pop: Adults with HR+/HER2- locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer harbouring PIK3CA tumour mutation, with disease recurrence/progression during or within 12 months of completing adjuvant endocrine therapy (effectively endocrine-resistant first-line metastatic)
pico.int: Inavolisib 9 mg orally once daily + palbociclib 125 mg orally once daily (3 weeks on / 1 off) + fulvestrant 500 mg IM (PI3K-alpha-selective inhibitor combination)
pico.out: Investigator-assessed progression-free survival (primary); overall survival (key secondary)
pico.subgroup: Visceral disease, prior chemotherapy, geographic region, baseline ECOG PS

real_data_entries.name: INAVO120
real_data_entries.group: HR+/HER2- PIK3CA-mut endocrine-resistant 1L mBC, inavolisib + palbociclib + fulvestrant vs placebo + palbociclib + fulvestrant (PFS primary)

allOutcomes.title: Investigator-assessed progression-free survival (primary; HR vs placebo arm)
Confirmed objective response rate in measurable disease (RR vs placebo arm)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Jhaveri KL et al. N Engl J Med 2024;391:1280-1290 (INAVO120).
